aboutAttributionsIntro: Arborito bundles the following third-party assets offline (no CDN at runtime):
aboutAttributionsNoble: Cryptography (curves, hashes, ciphers, base encodings) © Paul Miller.
aboutAttributionsNoto: Emoji glyph fallback font © Google LLC, used unmodified.
aboutAttributionsTailwind: Utility CSS compiled into the bundled stylesheet.
aboutAttributionsTwemoji: Emoji graphics © Twitter, Inc. and contributors, used unmodified.
aboutAttributionsWebtorrent: Peer-to-peer transfer © WebTorrent LLC and contributors.
impressumIntro: The block below is the mandatory German legal notice (Impressum) for the Treesys operator, as required by Germany's Digital Services Act (DDG, § 5) and the Interstate Media Treaty (MStV, § 18). For legal reasons it is published in German.
impressumText:
Arborito™ is a product of Treesys®.

Liability Disclaimer: The software is provided 'as is', without warranty of any kind, express or implied. Treesys is not an accredited educational institution and does not confer academic degrees. Certificates generated by this software are for gamification and self-tracking purposes only.

External Links: We accept no liability for the content of external links (e.g., third-party knowledge trees). The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content.
legalOwnerDefenseConfirmBody: Your signed response is published to third-party Nostr relays alongside the timestamp of the latest legal report. If a competent authority requires it by law, those operators may share minimal metadata; Arborito does not intermediate such requests. Continue?
legalReportDeclarationBody: I declare in good faith that the tree locations and work identification above are accurate to the best of my knowledge.
legalReportDescBody: Explain how this tree copies or closely imitates that work (min 200 characters).
legalReportLinksBody: Optional evidence links (one per line): official page, catalog, screenshot host, etc.
legalReportSent: Signed legal report stored on the network. Arborito does not relay messages between claimant and owner. Proof of settlement or withdrawal is handled outside the app (lawyer, court, or—if added later—a signed “withdraw” on the network). The distributor is not auto-notified and does not certify outcomes: use their contact only for app abuse or blocklist policy, not to mediate copyright disputes. This is not legal advice: for formal action, consult a lawyer.
legalReportWhatWorkBody: Which work is being used without permission? Give title, author or rights holder, and a public link if one exists (store page, ISBN page, etc.).
legalReportWhatWorkPlaceholder: Title, creator, link to the original listing…
legalReportWhatWorkTooShort: Please identify the work more clearly (at least {n} characters).
legalReportWhereInTreeBody: Where in this tree is the infringing material? Be specific: paths, lesson or deck titles, on-screen text, or node ids. Vague one-line reports are not useful.
legalReportWhereInTreePlaceholder: e.g. Module "Basics" → lesson "…" — the first card shows …
legalReportWhereTooShort: Please describe the location inside this tree more precisely (at least {n} characters).
